description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and large, floor-to-ceiling windows on the front and rear facades. The structure is predominantly white, with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic, and includes multiple rooms visible through the transparent windows. The main entryway is centrally located, flanked by tall windows, and leads into a spacious interior layout. The house appears to be a single-story building with a wide footprint, offering open-plan living spaces and several private rooms. The window arrangement is mostly symmetrical, providing ample natural light throughout the interior. The exterior surfaces are smooth and hard, likely constructed from concrete or stucco with glass accents.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large floor-to-ceiling windows, and a minimalist white exterior. The design features clean lines, symmetrical window placement, and a spacious, open-plan interior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, large windows, and the symmetrical facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house and additional windows on the side walls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more large windows and the overall width of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view revealing further side windows and the flat roof structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central main door with tall glass panels, no porch or steps, minimalist and flush with facade
